narrative:
North Royalton-06-C (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 974 registered voters, with 52.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.9%, a modest Republican lean of 5.6 percentage points.
